headline: Is Expedia Group, Inc. (EXPE) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is EXPE a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Expedia Group, Inc. on r/investing_discussion by Variant_Invest. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on EXPE. Expedia Group, Inc.’s share was trading at $231.06 as of June 9th. EXPE’s trailing and forward P/E were 20.41 and 11.72 respectively according to Yahoo […]
